false_positives.what_happened: Repo is a fork of jomjol/AI-on-the-edge-device; the code/components/jomjol_* tree is upstream code, not the forker's authorship. The within-file hits (Helper.cpp, MainFlowControl.cpp, ClassControllCamera.cpp, ClassFlowControll.cpp) are upstream's own structure. The two test_PointerEvalAnalogToDigitNew.cpp 'within-file' pairs are mirror-image test fixtures (parametrized test cases), an idiom not a defect.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: detect fork-of-upstream by the jomjol_* component namespace / fork relationship and treat as vendored; for test files (path contains /test/), apply a higher within-file threshold since parametrized fixtures are expected to repeat.
